name: Cashew Chicken and Cantaloupe
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cantaloupe, seeded, peeled, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the chopped cooked chicken, celery, grapes, and pineapple.
2. Add the tuna salad dressing; stir gently to coat all ingredients.
3. Place a leaf lettuce on each individual serving plate.
4. Arrange the cantaloupe wedges over the lettuce in a fan shape.
5. Spoon the chicken salad over the bottom of the cantaloupe fan.
6. Sprinkle with cashews.
2 Servings.
